heading: Surveys for, location, and construction of irrigation works generally
label: 411 Surveys for, location, and construction of irrigation works generally
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized and directed to make examinations and surveys for, and to locate and construct, as herein provided, irrigation works for the storage, diversion, and development of waters, including artesian wells.
notes: References in TextHerein, referred to in text, means in act , popularly known as the Reclamation Act, which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of act , to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.June 17, 1902June 17, 1902section 371 of this title

Amendments1946—Act , struck out provisions requiring annual reports to Congress as to results of those examinations and surveys.Aug. 7, 1946
